articles.title: Binance to Kick Off Cardano (ADA) and Cosmos (ATOM) Staking
articles.description: Interest in both blockchains has spiked with the new milestones. ATOM surged to a new all-time high in January. To accommodate the renewed interest, Binance will expand its staking feature to support both cryptocurrencies. On Wed Feb 10, the world’s largest cryptocurrency exchange by volume confirmed the news via a tweet. It opened the floor … Continued

Tesla Sees Proposal to Add Monero (XMR) as Payment Method
articles.description: The Tesla Effect Members of the monero community have created a petition on the community crowdfunding system to lobby Tesla to accept the privacy coin as a payment option. In the proposal, community members offer to buy three new Tesla Model 3 vehicles for $50,000 each, if they can use XMR as a means of … Continued

articles.title: Tezos Shoots for All-Time Highs After Joining Largest NFT Marketplace
articles.description: Tezos NFTs will now be available on OpenSea—the largest online NFT marketplace that previously only supported Ethereum tokens. The recently launched FA2 standard on Tezos, similar to Ethereum’s ERC-1155 standard, has seen a growing interest from the community. Tezos Joins OpenSea NFT volumes have surged since mid-January, ranging over $4 million daily. OpenSea is the leading marketplace...

articles.title: Perspective: Long-Term Bitcoin Chart Shows How Far Away The Top Could Be
articles.description: Bitcoin price charts are an amazing sight to behold. Past market cycles that used to look like bubbles that popped and fizzled out, eventually are eclipsed by the next major crypto uptrend. Another such instance is well underway, but when zooming out, the perspective shows just how distant the peak of this current cycle very well could be from here. Bullish Bitcoin Bubble Is Nowhere Near...

articles.title: Monero community wants Elon Musk to add XMR as Tesla payment option
articles.description: The Monero community has raised $150,000 as part of a proposal to add XMR as a payment option on the Tesla website.

articles.title: IOTA Blockchain Introduces Oracle Capabilities
articles.description: Most applications and platforms need to integrate data that is not available on-chain — which is where oracles come in. Oracles essentially act as a bridge between the two ecosystems by supplying verifiable data to decentralized applications. IOTA, one of the largest and most-used blockchain networks in the space, is introducing oracle capabilities to rival … Continued

articles.title: Litecoin's Charlie Lee: Tesla's Bitcoin Buy a ‘Turning Point’
articles.description: The Litecoin founder said Tesla's decision to potentially hold on to the Bitcoin it receives from consumers was "huge."
